_comment: Quality floors — these values can only improve, never regress. CI and immune-gate.sh enforce this. Updated automatically when metrics improve.
_floor_realignment_note: v5: ESLint dead-import sweep across SiteMap, RFIDetail, RFIs, Sidebar. StatusBadge component-in-render bug fixed. setState-in-effect wrapped in startTransition. eslintErrors 480→413 (-67).
_e2ePassRate_note: Set to 0 — no Playwright spec files exist in e2e/ yet; previous 0.7 was fictional.

_targets._comment: Where we want to be in 6 months — the organism moves floor values toward these targets

_note: Zero means zero. Rules we disagree with are deliberately downgraded to warnings in eslint.config.js. Everything remaining as an error must be zero.
